So we can really track the entire market, which is great.

How many are actually vacant.

So we'll show you the number of leases that each property has over the last 30 days, over the last seven days and the number of leases that each property averages per week.
Ok.
Yep.

And inside of here, I think we give you every key metric to help understand that.

So whether you like to base your comparisons off of price or price per foot, you know, you can go up to that metric sort of from high to low.
You can see as the most expensive one bedrooms who is the least expensive one bedrooms and then ultimately, you know where your one bedrooms are positioned.

it all looks great since it's automated.

If that's the case, we'll only apply that concession to that specific unit or if it says $500 off, you know, one month, I'm sorry, one bedroom, we'll apply it to that to those specific floor plans.
But like an instance like this where it says up to one month free off select units.
And it does not specify, we will actually apply this concession to every single unit that is available in the, in the property right now.

So select units turns into all units and, and what's interesting about that is we, whenever we were kind of ruling out the the concession and, and net effective portion of the tool, we actually surveyed all of our enterprise customers and asked for their best practices or what they think or what they prefer.
And this, this approach is what was overwhelmingly preferred.
So if it says select units, it's not specified to, to apply that to every unit that is available.

cool.
